23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 
26 ContactAbstractFamily::
27 ContactAbstractFamily(const ContactFamily & family,
28  IIndexManager * manager)
29 : m_family(family)
30 , m_manager(manager)
31 {
32  ;
33 }
34 
35 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
36 
37 ContactAbstractFamily::
38 ~ContactAbstractFamily()
39 {
40  m_manager->keepAlive(this);
41 }
42 
43 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
44 
45 void
46 ContactAbstractFamily::
47 uniqueIdToLocalId(Int32ArrayView localIds, Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const
48 {
49 
50  ARCANE_ASSERT((localIds.size() == uniqueIds.size()),("Incompatible array argument sizes"));
51 
52  const Integer family_size = m_family.maxLocalId();
53  ArcGeoSim::VMap<Int64, Int32> uid_to_lid_map(family_size);
54 
55  const ContactInternal * internals = m_family.contactsInternal();
56  for(Integer i=0;i<family_size;++i)
57  {
58  const Int64 uid = _form_unique_id(internals[i]);
59  const Int32 lid = i;
60  uid_to_lid_map[uid] = lid;
61  }
62 
63  const Integer sample_size = uniqueIds.size();
64  for(Integer i=0;i<sample_size;++i)
65  {
66  ArcGeoSim::VMap<Int64, Int32>::const_iterator finder = uid_to_lid_map.find(uniqueIds[i]);
67  if (finder == uid_to_lid_map.end())
68  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Cannot find contact uid");
69  localIds[i] = finder.value();
70  }
71 }
72 
73 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
74 
75 IIndexManager::IAbstractFamily::Item
76 ContactAbstractFamily::
77 item(Int32 localId) const
78 {
79  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
80  const ContactInternal & internal = m_family.contactsInternal()[localId];
81  return IAbstractFamily::Item(_form_unique_id(internal),
82  internal.owner());
83 }
84 
85 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
86 
87 SafeConstArrayView<Integer>
88 ContactAbstractFamily::
89 owners(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
90 {
91  const Integer size = localIds.size();
92  SharedArray<Integer> result(size);
93  const ContactInternal * internals = m_family.contactsInternal();
94  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
95  {
96  Int32 localId = localIds[i];
97  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
98  result[i] = internals[localId].owner();
99  }
100  return result;
101 }
102 
103 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
104 
105 SafeConstArrayView<Int64>
106 ContactAbstractFamily::
107 uids(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
108 {
109  const Integer size = localIds.size();
110  SharedArray<Int64> result(size);
111  const ContactInternal * internals = m_family.contactsInternal();
112  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
113  {
114  Int32 localId = localIds[i];
115  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
116  result[i] = _form_unique_id(internals[localId]);
117  }
118  return result;
119 }
120 
121 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
122 
123 SafeConstArrayView<Int32>
124 ContactAbstractFamily::
125 allLocalIds() const
126 {
127  const Integer size = m_family.maxLocalId();
128  SharedArray<Int32> local_ids(size);
129  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
130  local_ids[i] = i;
131  return local_ids;
132 }
133 
134 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
135 
136 Int64
137 ContactAbstractFamily::
138 _form_unique_id(const ContactInternal & contact)
139 {
140  const Arcane::Item item_1(contact.item1Internal());
141  const Arcane::Item item_2(contact.item2Internal());
142 
143  if (item_1.null())
144  {
145  ARCANE_ASSERT((not item_2.null()),("Inconsistent (null,null) contact"));
146  const Int64 item_2_uid = item_2.uniqueId();
147  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_2_uid & ~m_integer_mask) == 0 and item_2_uid < m_integer_mask),("Too large item2 unique id %d", item_2_uid));
148  return item_2_uid << m_integer_size | m_integer_mask;
149  }
150  else
151  {
152  const Int64 item_1_uid = item_1.uniqueId();
153  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_1_uid & ~m_integer_mask) == 0 and item_1_uid < m_integer_mask),("Too large item1 unique id %d", item_1_uid));
154 
155  if (item_2.null())
156  {
157  return m_integer_mask << m_integer_size | item_1_uid;
158  }
159  else
160  {
161  const Int64 item_2_uid = item_2.uniqueId();
162  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_2_uid & ~m_integer_mask and item_2_uid < m_integer_mask) == 0),("Too large item2 unique id %d", item_2_uid));
163  return item_2_uid << m_integer_size | item_1_uid;
164  }
165  }
166 }
167 
168 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
169 
170 END_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
